hospital.descripcion: Multi-agent medical system with parallel orchestration
detalles: 8 medical specialists evaluating in parallel (Cardiology, Neurology, etc.)
Automatic triage + consensus for specialist selection
Persistent memory with PostgreSQL + LangGraph checkpointing
Real-time WebSocket streaming + D3.js visualization
Timing: triage <2s, parallel evaluation <3s, response <2s

bankfraud.descripcion: Bank fraud prediction tool with Logistic Regression
detalles: Complete flow: preprocessing → prediction → optimal threshold
StandardScaler + Logistic Regression with calibrated threshold (0.9154)
Visualizations: confusion matrix, ROC curve, feature importance
REST API + step-by-step interactive web dashboard
Metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC

watchdogs.descripcion: Multi-agent system for video analysis with GPT-4 Vision
detalles: LangGraph Native Parallelism - 4 simultaneous agents
Vision Agent + OCR Agent + Detection Agent + Geolocation Agent
Retry Logic with Exponential Backoff + Circuit Breaker
Rate Limiting (30 req/min) + restrictive CORS
Real-time monitoring dashboard

threatintel.descripcion: Enterprise threat intel platform with NER, BERT and LDA
detalles: NER with spaCy for IP, domain, hash extraction
Severity classification with BERT (5 levels)
Topic Modeling with LDA + coherence scoring
AlienVault OTX integration
Alert workflow: NEW → ACKNOWLEDGED → RESOLVED

siem.descripcion: SIEM with unsupervised ML for 0-day attack detection
detalles: Ensemble: Isolation Forest (50%) + DBSCAN (30%) + GMM (20%)
Multi-parser: Syslog, Nginx, Auth logs, Firewall
Feature Engineering: 15+ behavioral features
Online Learning with feedback loop
80% false positive reduction vs traditional SIEM

emailthreat.descripcion: Dual SPAM + Phishing detector with professional SOC dashboard
detalles: Dual Analysis: SPAM (~95%) + Phishing (~92%)
Threat Report: IOCs, trigger words, risk score
TF-IDF vectorization (5000 features)
Professional dark theme SOC dashboard
Inference <10ms per email
